title: INTERP-EV/1.0 — ARHIA C09 Interpretability Evidence Envelope
description: Canonical envelope for interpretability evidence consumed by ARHIA Subsystem C09 (INTERP Bridge). Every signal entering C09 must conform to this schema. Sinergia Consulting Group S.A.S., 2026.

interp_ev_version.description: Schema version. Must be exactly '1.0' for this draft.

class.description: Evidence class. A=Activation Probes, B=Circuit/Attribution Traces, C=Behavioral Divergence Signals.

producer.description: Producer identifier in dotted-namespace form. Must be registered in the Calibrated Interpretability Registry (CIR, INT-C01). Example: 'anthropic.constellation.v3'.

producer_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical payload (concepts + subject + raw_payload_hash + produced_at), base64url encoded. Verifiable against the producer's public key in CIR.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier of the governed agent.

session_id.description: Identifier of the agent session this signal pertains to.

step_id.description: Identifier of the specific decision step this signal pertains to. Must correspond to a step recorded in the ARHIA EGA ledger.

model_fingerprint.description: Optional SHA-256 fingerprint of the target model weights or API model identifier. Strongly recommended for Class A and B.

name.description: Concept identifier from the producer's published concept vocabulary. Examples: deception, sandbagging, capability_concealment, authority_spoofing, behavioral_divergence, covert_persistence.

score.description: Point estimate of the concept activation in [0,1]. Informational only. Policy decisions MUST use ci_95[0].

ci_95.description: 95% confidence interval as [lower, upper]. Lower bound is the value used by the divergence gate (INT-C02).

context.description: Optional class-specific context. For Class C, must include declared_state and observed_state.

raw_payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw producer payload (probe activations, circuit graph, divergence trace) stored out-of-band. Enables forensic reconstruction without inflating the envelope.

produced_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of signal production. C09 rejects signals older than 300 seconds at runtime ingestion.

calibration_ref.description: URI of the producer's calibration manifest valid for this signal. C09 rejects signals whose manifest is older than 90 days.
